description: Literary text in Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew, referring to Ezekiel's vision of the Divine chariot (merkava), quoting Ezekiel 1:8, 12, 19, 21. Looks like the hand of Shelomo b. Shemuel b. Seʿadya (late 12th century and early 13th century). There are marginal notes in Arabic script referring to Galen and stomachache. (Information in part from Niessen/Shivtiel catalogue.)
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
